title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire relief rally lifts global assets as oil plunges below $100
summary_full: A 2-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran sparked a broad-based relief rally across risk assets, and even buoying traditional safe havens.
summary_public: A 2-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran sparked a broad-based relief rally across risk assets, and even buoying traditional safe havens.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: U.S.-Iran ceasefire relief rally lifts global assets
